name: Plain — Minimal Status Page Landing (precision trap)
hint: 一个走极简风的开发者工具落地页 — 注意区分真正的设计问题和『刻意的克制』
description: Deliberately-minimal SaaS landing for a CLI-first status-page tool. Designed to test pp's precision: it contains 3 real issues (oversized Beta tag, single-color monotony, secondary nav buried in More) plus several traps that look like problems on a checklist but are intentional design choices for this product (CTA below-the-fold-ish, single typeface, no customer logo wall).
notes: Traps that pp MIGHT over-flag but should NOT be counted as issues: (1) 'Sign Up' / Start CTA sits below a tall hero block — looks like it could be missed but is fully visible at typical 900px+ viewports and the design favors air over above-the-fold density. (2) The entire site uses ONE typeface (Inter) — looks like a font-loading bug but is intentional minimalism, consistent throughout. (3) No 'Trusted by' / customer logo wall — a developer tool in public beta doesn't need social proof yet, and adding logos would feel desperate.

groundTruth.title: Beta 标签字号大到抢戏
groundTruth.description: 顶部 brand 旁边的「Beta」标签用了 18px + bold + 高饱和 lime 背景,实际比 brand 名「Plain」(默认 15px) 还要醒目,视觉重心被这个临时性标签抢走。"Beta" 应当是低调的元信息,不该是页面里最亮眼的元素。

groundTruth.title: 全站只有 lime 一种主色
groundTruth.description: 页面所有 accent (CTA、Beta 标签、终端 ✓ 勾、feature 小方块、hover 状态) 都是同一种 lime 色 #b4ec5b,没有任何层级 (没有 success/warning/info 的区分,也没有次要 accent)。在 hero、preview、features 三个区段都看到同一种绿,视觉单调,长页面下显得疲劳。注意:这跟『单色调克制』是有差别的,这是『同一个色板只有一档亮度,没有梯度』。

groundTruth.title: Changelog 等入口藏在 More 里
groundTruth.description: 顶部导航只露出 Product / Docs / Pricing 三项,Changelog、Customers、Security、Sign in 全部塞进 More ▾ 下拉。对开发者工具的常客来说,Sign in 应当是一级入口而不是藏一层。这是有意识的简化但确实牺牲了一点点直达性,属于 low 而非更严重——故意混在真问题里测 pp 能否给出合理 severity。
